req-auth-001.description: Service interface abstraction for auth provider - IAuthService with sign-in, sign-out, getSession, onAuthStateChange methods that can be implemented by Supabase or mock provider

req-auth-002.description: Local MST AuthStore for reactive auth state - tracks currentUser, isAuthenticated, isLoading, error states for UI binding

req-auth-003.description: Environment extension to inject auth service into MST stores - follows existing environment pattern for dependency injection

req-auth-004.description: Supabase auth provider implementation - concrete IAuthService using @supabase/supabase-js for email/password signup, login, logout

req-auth-005.description: Mock auth provider for testing - in-memory implementation of IAuthService that doesn't require network calls

req-auth-006.description: Auth state synchronization - subscribe to Supabase auth state changes and sync to local MST store automatically

req-auth-007.description: Session persistence across page reloads - restore auth state from Supabase session on app initialization
